code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import LandingPage from'./pages/LandingPage';import ChatPage from'./pages/ChatPage';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function App(){const[onApp,setOnApp]=useState(false);const[userProfile,setUserProfile]=useState(()=>{const saved=localStorage.getItem('userProfile');return saved?JSON.parse(saved):null;});useEffect(()=>{if(userProfile){localStorage.setItem('userProfile',JSON.stringify(userProfile));}},[userProfile]);if(!onApp){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(LandingPage,{onStart:()=>setOnApp(true)});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ChatPage,{userProfile:userProfile,setUserProfile:setUserProfile,onExit:()=>setOnApp(false)});}
